description_long: This is a rectangular wooden drawer with a rich brown finish and a decorative geometric diamond pattern on its front and sides. The drawer features a solid, flat top and a slightly protruding base, giving it a sturdy and classic appearance. The wood grain is visible across the top and sides, adding a natural texture to the surface. The front and side panels are adorned with dark, repeating diamond motifs, enhancing its ornamental appeal. There are no visible handles or hardware, suggesting a minimalist or push-to-open design. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for use in urban environments such as public seating areas, parks, or as part of street furniture.
description: A rectangular wooden drawer with a decorative diamond pattern and a solid, flat top, finished in a rich brown wood grain. No visible handles or hardware are present.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full decorative diamond pattern across the face and the solid, flat top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the drawer and a single diamond motif on the end panel.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the same diamond pattern and flat top visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and a single diamond motif on the end panel.
